---
name: Bug Report
about: Create a report to help us fix issues and improve SynEdge.
title: '[Bug]: '
labels: 'bug'
---

## 🐛 Bug Description
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## 🔄 Steps to Reproduce
Steps to reproduce the behavior:
1. Open SynEdge
2. Go to '...'
3. Click on '....'
4. See error

## 🎯 Expected Behavior
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## 📱 Device Information
- **Device Model:** [e.g., Samsung Galaxy S23 Ultra, Google Pixel 8]
- **Android Version:** [e.g., Android 14, Android 13]
- **SynEdge App Version:** [e.g., v1.53]
- **Custom ROM / Root Status:** [e.g., Stock, LineageOS, Rooted with Magisk]

## 📸 Screenshots or Screen Recordings
If applicable, add screenshots or a short screen recording to help explain your problem. Visuals make debugging much faster!

## 📝 Additional Context
Add any other context about the problem here (e.g., does this happen only when using headphones? Does it happen on the lock screen?).
